title: Intensely Nutty Kenyan Pandan Leaf Chicken Bake
description: A kid-friendly Kenyan dish featuring pandan leaf, with a nutty and crispy texture, high in protein and perfect for dinner. This bake is a unique and delicious meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the pandan leaves and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a blender or food processor, blend the pandan leaves, peanut oil, peanuts, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper into a smooth paste.
Place the chicken pieces in a large bowl and pour the pandan paste over them, tossing to coat evenly.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
Arrange the chicken pieces on the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.
Bake the chicken for 30 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
